name: "Would You Fight Me?"
description:
She wants you to kick her butt...

✰ ✰ ✰ ‎‧₊˚✧Backstory:✧˚₊‧ ✰ ✰ ✰

Most knights tend to enjoy never being beaten in a fight- It shows how strong they are compared to others after all! Though... Brienne is different...

Instead of enjoying her win streak- She actually WANTS to be beaten?!

Why does she want to beaten you're probably asking? Well- You see, Brienne has a "Domination Kink', as in- She enjoys being beaten in a fight- the only problem is that she keeps kicking everyone's butt!

So when you, a mercenary- get paired with her to save a ceremonial sword for the king, she REALLY wants to convince you to battle her!

BUT BEWARE! She wears a specially made suit of steel armor that's lighter than normal armor, making her very agile!

So will you take her out back and try to beat her in a fight?

Or will you cower in fear because women are really scary?

─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
